title: Tis better to give than to receive
display_title: Tis better to give than to receive
wikitext:
[]: 'Tis better to give than to receive             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Wed Dec 01, 2010 2:45 pm It's coming up to Christmas time, ladies and gents. What would you give the cast of Evangelion? I'd give Rei some books by Immanuel Kant, as he had a lot to say about duty and how it relates to morality. I'd give Shinji some time alone with Kaworu. Although really, it'd be Shinji and Kaworu giving each other gifts. Asuka would get a goddamn hug, and also some video games. Keehl Lorenz would get a swift kick in the balls. I'm not sure about the others.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Dec 01, 2010 2:49 pm For all of SEELE, a slow, painful, horrible, excruciating execution. For everyone else save maybe the stooges and Hikari, extensive psychological therapy. EDIT: That's for Misato, Ritsuko, the pilots, and NERV Staff. For Gendo I'd say at the bare minimum a lump of coal, For Fuyu, maybe a Yui doll. Not sure about any/everyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Wed Dec 01, 2010 3:53 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: For Fuyu, maybe a Yui doll.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Dec 01, 2010 4:52 pm Asuka: Second the big hug, video games, and therapy ideas. Shinji: A spine. That's for Asuka too, really, but whatever. Also, several bottles of social lubricant (read: sake). Rei: Life for Dummies. It's not a real book, but it should be. Misato: A revived Kaji. Kaworu, SEELE, Gendo: Bullets. Between the eyes. Yui: A trip through a black hole. Enjoy, bitch.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Dec 01, 2010 5:53 pm Shinji: some shelf help books and some batteries for his SDAT Asuka: therapy, and second the video games Fuyu: Seasons kaworu: A hug from Unit 01 Rei: for dummies books All pilots: therapy! Kensuke: A new camcorder Toji: his leg

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Dec 01, 2010 6:02 pm I'm not good at this, but I want to give something to Shinji, Kaworu, Maya, Rei, and Asuka....

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Dec 01, 2010 6:09 pm Misato: my body Xard: my body Oz: some plane tickets to New York to go see the Takemitsu festival with me.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Wed Dec 01, 2010 6:28 pm Shinji: A slap in the face Asuka: A slap on the ass Rei: A slap on the...oh wait she LCL'd on me....

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Wed Dec 01, 2010 7:11 pm I would share a good, hearty meal of fish and chips with Pen². If anyone else wants to join, they're welcome to. In fact, it's encouraged. Merry Christmas, Tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Wed Dec 01, 2010 8:18 pm To all of the cast: Some friendship Armbands Particuly Asuka : A Parrot (Yarrrr!) Shinji : A new Ipod (he lives in the future with a (S)DAT time for some upgrades) Rei : Tea Dishes and stuff for her home , so she can invite people less hesitant Misato : A Bear around the world box, with bear of 12 different Countrys Gendo : A Calender with jokes so he can remember what its like to have fun little by little Ritsuko : Some science stuff and maybe neko plushies Maya : A HUUUUUUGE Teddy bear, just for the sake of teh cuteness Kaworu : the bible so he can laugh while he trys to understand humanity OT. The Gal above me totally copied me.... totally..... :P Guess now we are the Rami-twins? >_>

[]: To everyone else: comemorative coins, because I don't care.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Dec 01, 2010 8:37 pm To Shinji: A week alone with Kaji. Seriously, he'll be a good influence. The kid needs a male role model more than anything. To Asuka: A week alone with Shinji. They'll either fall in love or kill each other. It's best to get just it over with now. failing that, MY BODY. To Rei: A hug. See how she likes it. >:[ To Mari: A slap on the ass and a jaunty wink. Trust me, it'll work .

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 01, 2010 10:26 pm I'd give them each a pair of socks.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Wed Dec 01, 2010 10:35 pm A 26 episode series about my life on DVD. Matt Greenfield, Tiffany Grant, and V do a commentary track on several episodes that sounds like a bunch of bullshit and very little about my series at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Wed Dec 01, 2010 11:46 pm ran1 wrote: Misato: my body Xard: my body Oz: some plane tickets to New York to go see the Takemitsu festival with me.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Thu Dec 02, 2010 12:23 am Oz wrote: You are not giving me your body, ranny? Then we could engage in an awesome orgy. More on topic: Maya needs a hug every day.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Fri Dec 03, 2010 12:07 am every one here is leaving out our good friends the angels... did anyone ever think that all they ever wanted was a little bit of love... id give them each one of them an easy bake oven... Misato: gets a map of Nerv headquarters, ive seen her get lost there at least once so yea.... Rei: gets some fresh ace bandages Asuka: some pfeffernusse... im sure she would appreciate some german cookies Shinji: an MP3 player... welcome to the 21st century dude ... and thats prolly all the money i'd be able to spend this christmas... i iz brokez

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Dec 03, 2010 12:39 am Mhh, I wasn't thinking about this possible topic at all, I've only some ideas for now: Shikinami: a PSP (or maybe a DS), the Wonderswan has died from a long time. (Re)i: a cooking book, she probably needs one to get some ideas (she seemed to cook without one in 2.22, it's weird for someone who probably never cooked) Shinji: one week with his father but the problem is convincing Gendo... I've to think about the other characters, maybe a bottle of liquor to Misato just to be sure that she'll appreciate it? And something neko-related for Ritsuko but indeed I'm lacking ideas right now...

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Dec 03, 2010 1:08 am Galaxy News Reidio wrote: Keehl Lorenz would get a swift kick in the balls.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Dec 03, 2010 1:14 am what ran1 said about Misato, and I would also give my body to Yui within teh Tang, Rule 34 at its most pleasurable (for me anyway) and what GGS-S said

[]:             Quote Post by Zan » Fri Dec 03, 2010 10:26 am Asuka: A hug and the opportunity to kick my ass at any activity of her choice (with some restrictions for safety and legality). And maybe a trip to Okinawa too. Shinji: Brand new iPod, and some time to just relax with people who care about him Rei: A glass case for Gendo's glasses, some nicer bedsheets Misato: Case of beer, case of microwavable meals, and some time away from Asuka, Shinji, and NERV in general Pen-Pen: Fish 'n chips, and a newer, fancier towel
